PLAINTIFF MARIA ISTEL'S MOTION TO REMOVE CASE FROM ARBITRATION CALENDAR IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. COURT ORDERED A MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SCHEDULED ON 7/28/2010 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT ORDERED A JURY TRIAL DATE SCHEDULED ON 10/25/2010 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. COURT TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212)

Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Maria Istel's Motion to Remove Case From Arbitration Calendar is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 7/28/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date scheduled on 10/25/2010 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings not reported. (212)
